Check Name: Ensure EC2 instance profile is attached
No SSH open to the world
What It Tests: No ingress rule allows 0.0.0.0/0 or ::/0 on port 22

Check Name: No RDP open to the world
What It Tests: No ingress rule allows 0.0.0.0/0 or ::/0 on port 3389
No ingress rule allows 0.0.0.0/0 on ports 80/443/8080/8443

Check Name: EBS volume encrypted with customer-managed KMS key
What It Tests: KmsKeyId must be set to a customer-managed CMK

Check Name: RDS instance is not publicly accessible
RDS auto minor version upgrade enabled
Subnet does not auto-assign public IP

What It Tests: At least one flow log must exist for the VPC
